issue.title: Go-replacement W: remove bigclaw-go e2e Python helpers tranche 2

commands: dirs=(); for p in README.md bigclaw-go/docs docs .github .husky .git/hooks; do [ -e "$p" ] && dirs+=("$p"); done; rg -n "bigclaw-go/scripts/e2e/.*\.py|scripts/e2e/.*\.py" "${dirs[@]}"

rg -n "validation_bundle_continuation_policy_gate\.py|export_validation_bundle\.py|run_task_smoke\.py|multi_node_shared_queue\.py|mixed_workload_matrix\.py|cross_process_coordination_surface\.py|subscriber_takeover_fault_matrix\.py|external_store_validation\.py" tests bigclaw-go docs README.md workflow.md .github . -g '!reports/**' -g '!.symphony/workpad.md' 2>/dev/null
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation e2e run-task-smoke --help
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation e2e export-validation-bundle --help
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation e2e continuation-scorecard --help
cd bigclaw-go && go run ./cmd/bigclawctl automation e2e continuation-policy-gate --help

results.stale_reference_scan: no matches in existing README/docs/workflow/hooks/CI surfaces
results.stale_python_test_scan: no live matches outside historical tracker/regression references

blocker.summary: No additional in-repo implementation work remains for BIG-GO-1053.

notes: The tranche-2 e2e Python helper files were already absent in this checkout before the evidence commits were created, so the code migration itself is represented by origin/main at commit 004de016.

The 2026-04-03 validation snapshot recorded a repo-wide Python count of 43 because BIG-GO-1057 removed one Python entrypoint while this closeout was being rebased and this lane also deleted two stale Python tests that still imported removed tranche-2 helpers.

The follow-up rebased commits on main add the missing validation and closeout artifacts so the lane has the same in-repo reporting surface as adjacent Go-replacement issues, while the final cleanup removes stale test-only imports of deleted helper paths.

The 2026-04-03 unattended refresh preserved `BIG-GO-1053` as an archived section inside `.symphony/workpad.md` while leaving the newer active workpad intact, and aligned `bigclaw-go/docs/go-cli-script-migration.md` so the tranche-2 Python-free e2e surface is explicitly attributed to this issue.
The evidence branch symphony/BIG-GO-1053-validation was deleted after its contents were landed on main; the pull_request_seed link is retained only as historical traceability.

The published `BIG-GO-1053-closeout` tag was retargeted on 2026-04-03 and is now the canonical stable reference for the final `main` tip carrying the closeout artifacts, avoiding further drift from self-referential commit hashes in the issue reports.
A final closeout comment was posted on merged PR #217 to synchronize the remote record with the additional mainline cleanup commits.
No BIG-GO-1053 record exists in local-issues.json or the Symphony local issue store, so any remaining active state is external to this workspace.
